narrative:
Newton Falls Village 4A (precinct in Trumbull County) has 703 registered voters, with 62.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.5%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.1 percentage points.
